# Ship Tornado TMS

> Ship Tornado is a Transportation Management System for shipping, order management, cartonization, inventory, and package tracking.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and dashboard entry point.
- [Sign in](/login): Account sign-in.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a new account.
- [Track a package](/track): Look up shipment tracking details.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle data and comply with GDPR/CCPA.
